feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: We All Go a Little Mad Sometimes
entry.summary:
Author: Maximoff_Wanda

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,586Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck tugged at his wrists again, feeling the recognizable stickiness of the tape now holding his hands together. Fuck. This wasn’t good.He’s wearing a striped shirt he doesn’t recognize and his jeans look lighter than the pair he put on this morning... at the motel... Eddie.His heart rate skyrocketed as he tried to remember what happened, how he got there, but more importantly where Eddie was. He felt too weak and sluggish to turn around to see if Eddie was in the same situation as him behind him, but fuck, he really hoped Eddie was okay.That Eddie was far, far away from whatever was happening here.OR: My version of what could happen in 9x13

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: you make me shiver with the fire you got
entry.summary:
Author: folklorestars

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “Have you seen me and Hen get sick at the same time in our fifteen years of close friendship working at the 118?” Chimney asked, looking between Buck and Eddie seriously.Buck’s mouth opened and closed a few times like a fish, his mind blanking on when an event like that occurred in their several years working together. Eddie stared at him helplessly, throwing Buck into the deep end to answer for them, making him grimace.Scrunching his face together in deep thought, Buck replied more like a question with, “Yes?”“No!” Chimney barked. Everyone in the circle jumped with fright.“Weak immune systems?” Eddie tried again, wincing slightly.“Just get in the truck,” Chimney ordered with immense defeat.Or; Buck and Eddie are secretly dating, but they both catch a cold at the same time, raising suspicions at work.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

entry.title: The Place I Come Back To
entry.summary:
Author: Pastel Moon (PastelVA)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,028Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 1

Summary: After Buck is kidnapped by a man who blames him for an old loss, he makes it out alive, but not unchanged. Recovery comes in fragments: sleepless nights, trembling hands, grief that never quite learned how to leave, and the unbearable humiliation of needing to be held together by someone else. So he goes where he can still breathe. He goes to Eddie. Under Eddie’s roof, in the quiet shape of domesticity and the shadow of everything they have already lost, Buck begins to understand that survival is only the first half of the story. The second half is softer, but more frightening. And maybe, at last, a kind of coming home.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: AL's Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Lounananana

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,791Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Albert is back in L.A., and he’s just met an absolute angel of a firefighter—cute, gorgeous, kind, and hot. “An angel from the 105?” Chimney says. “Let me ask probie—he just pulled a shift over there.”  Meanwhile, Ravi can’t seem to shake a certain flirtatious playboy. No matter where he goes, it’s like the guy is haunting him.All he knows is that the guy's name is AL.

entry.title: Kintsugi (Keep Loving Me)
entry.summary:
Author: Buki_stories21

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,463Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 34

Summary: kintsugi /ˈkɪntsəɡi,kɪntˈsuːɡi/ noun The Japanese art of repairing broken pottery by joining pieces back together and filling cracks with lacquer dusted with powdered gold, silver, or platinum, thereby highlighting the flaws in the mended object.   (Can be read as a stand alone since it's parallel with the previous one)

entry.title: lost inside a memory of someone's life (it wasn't mine)
entry.summary:
Author: lifelessframe

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,348Chapters: 9/18Kudos: 147

Summary: Buck wrote them all a letter. One to Maddie, saying he loves her and he’s sorry. One to Hen, thanking her for always being there. One to Chim, asking him to take good care of himself and his family. One to Chris, explaining why he won’t be around anymore. And one to Eddie, which somehow ended up being the shortest. Or Buck tries to kill himself after Bobby’s death. Eddie is heartbroken, slightly seething, and he just doesn't understand.

entry.title: Nothing Left To Do
entry.summary:
Author: hyperfixatedhoney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,036Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 74

Summary: “Buck,” Eddie is standing next to Buck but shifts to look Buck in the eye. There’s a look in Eddie’s eyes that Buck refuses to let himself acknowledge. It’s soft, welcoming, it makes Buck believe whatever Eddie says, “I’m sure it’ll be fine. We probably just missed out on a hitter, there was that one guy out of Austin Bobby was trying to get”“Yeah, you’re right,” Buck agreed, Eddie was right, it’ll be okay, “Well, nothing left to do but win huh?”Eddie smiles, gentle and sincere, “Nothing left to do but win”. OR: Buddie Baseball AU (no actual knowledge of baseball required)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Let Him Suffer (Coda 9x12)
entry.summary:
Author: RavensCAT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,992Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 66

Summary: “Since when do you have so many tattoos?” Buck glances down as well, looking almost surprised at the way his tattoos are on full display.  “Since a couple years ago,” he shrugs, his smile turning into a lazy sort of smirk. Eddie narrows his eyes, taking in the ink marring Buck’s skin. His gaze rakes over the muscles of his arms and chest, noting each tattoo with a critical eye. His fingers ache to touch, to trace the lines of ink, to claim- He takes a step back, putting some much needed space between them.  “I swear every time I see you there’s more,” he mumbles. Buck chuckles softly, shrugging again.  “What can I say? I’m a big believer in body art.” Eddie watches the muscles in his shoulders flex with the motion, the ink shifting over the skin.  Buck catches him staring, of course he does. His smile returns, cocky as ever. “You can touch, you know.” He takes a step closer so they’re only inches apart again.  Eddie swallows hard, hands itching at his sides.  He longs to touch.  But he doesn’t. “No.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Gives You Hell
entry.summary:
Author: UnlostDrarry

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,596Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: “We have to go and find him!,” Eddie yelled in a panic, pulling off the monitor and starting to remove his IV. “Woah, woah!,” the doctor yelled, rushing into the room. “Mr. Diaz, I need you to lie back down. We need to monitor your brain waves to make sure you don’t have a concussion.” “My partner is missing! I don’t care about my potential concussion, I care about Buck!” “Mr. Diaz, if you don’t calm down, we’ll have to sedate you.” “I can’t lose him again, I can’t. We just fixed things. What if- oh God,” Eddie heaved. “Eddie. Look at me,” Maddie instructed gently, grabbing his hand. “I know it’s hard, but I need you to breathe with me. Right now, you’re our best chance at finding Buck okay? If you start freaking out, they’re going to sedate you, and we’ll lose the precious time that we need to find him. I know you love my brother, but you’re of no use to him if you can’t think clearly. Focus.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Coitus Operandi
entry.summary:
Author: izquierd

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,099Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: Eddie rolls his eyes dramatically. “Ravi, quit being so scandalised, we share a shower, and our locker room is made of glass, it’s not like you haven’t seen it before.” “Which is very different from seeing it literally in action, Eddie.” “I’m pretty sure that Harry got an eyeful of your manhood, so consider this some step-brotherly payback,” inserts Buck. “A little better than seeing your coworker getting his dick sucked, but okay,” Ravi mumbles under his breath. “Ravi, please. You cannot tell anyone.” “What? About your exhibitionist streak?” “We are not exhibitionists!” “Buck, you’re a bit of an exhibitionist,” Eddie stage-whispers, which earns him a firm shoulder-shove and a stern glance.Buck and Eddie get too hot and heavy in the firehouse, Ravi gets traumatised, and Buck and Eddie have an important conversation.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Buck was a Palmetto State Fox AU
entry.summary:
Author: MultiFandom_Trash23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,895Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Buck turns in a circle slowly while still making his way towards the stairs. The sight was amazing. The only other time he could remember feeling like this was the first time he stepped foot onto the Foxes Court. He stops at the base of the stairs and takes them slowly. When he reaches the top the smell of spaghetti, and the sound of his new team chattering amongst themselves hit his senses. It’s oddly reminiscent of the mandatory team dinners Dan implemented his first year at Palmetto and that Neil kept going after she graduated. He kept them going the year he was captain after Neil graduated too. He hopes Robin is still doing them. He approaches the table slowly. An Asian man is the first to spot him, his jaw drops, probably having recognized him. Buck had never really gotten used to the public aspect of being a Fox. Even now that he’s graduated people still recognize him all the time. Most of his classmates at the academy had recognized him pretty quickly. Most of them also wondered what he was doing there instead of in the National Exy League. “Hi, I’m Evan Buckley, I was told to report to Captain Nash.” He introduces himself. Or The AU where Buck was a Fox
